task_completion.description: Verify the agent is operating within the 'Northwind Traders' business.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The business name 'Northwind Traders' should be visible in the top left or main header of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the Liability account 'Business Loan' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The account 'Business Loan' is visible in the Chart of Accounts under Liabilities, or it is selected in the Account dropdown of the payment screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expense account 'Loan Interest' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The account 'Loan Interest' is visible in the Chart of Accounts under Expenses, or it is selected in the Account dropdown of the payment screen.

task_completion.description: Verify a payment is recorded on 2025-02-15 from 'Cash on Hand'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Payments screen or a specific Payment view/edit screen, the Date field is set to '2025-02-15' and the 'Paid from' account is set to 'Cash on Hand'.

task_completion.description: Verify 1,000.00 of the payment is allocated to the 'Business Loan' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Payment view/edit screen, there is a line item with the Account set to 'Business Loan' and the Amount set to 1,000.00.

task_completion.description: Verify 250.00 of the payment is allocated to the 'Loan Interest' account, making the total 1,250.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Payment view/edit screen, there is a second line item with the Account set to 'Loan Interest' and the Amount set to 250.00. The total payment amount shown should be 1,250.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web interface or desktop application being clicked and typed into, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to mock the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine Manager.io accounting software, not a text editor (like nano, vim, or Notepad) displaying the expected values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the application to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like the Chart of Accounts settings or the New Payment form being filled out, rather than just a final success screen magically appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Business Name: Northwind Traders. Expected Liability Account: 'Business Loan'. Expected Expense Account: 'Loan Interest'. Expected Total Payment Amount: 1250.00. Expected Principal Allocation: 1000.00 to 'Business Loan'. Expected Interest Allocation: 250.00 to 'Loan Interest'. Expected Date: 2025-02-15. Source Account: 'Cash on Hand'.
